findings.title: Anthropic releases Claude Mythos 5 with 10T parameters
findings.summary: Anthropic launched Claude Mythos 5, a 10-trillion parameter model excelling in cybersecurity, coding, and reasoning. This represents a major frontier capability jump, intensifying the AI arms race with massive scaling.
findings.claim_excerpt: Anthropic’s Claude Mythos 5 with 10 trillion parameters for advanced cybersecurity and coding.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Signals continued parameter scaling race, raising stakes for safety evaluations on hyper-scale models.
findings.confidence_basis: Multiple sources corroborate the release details.

sources_cited.excerpt: Claude Mythos 5 by Anthropic: A hyper-advanced AI model built with 10-trillion parameters.

search_queries_run: new AI model releases past 48 hours
research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Two independent sources confirm model name, parameter count, and capabilities within April 2026 context.

findings.review_reason: Assess benchmark performance and safety mitigations for 10T model.

findings.title: Google DeepMind launches Gemini 3.1 with multimodal real-time capabilities
findings.summary: Gemini 3.1 introduces real-time voice/image analysis and scores 94.3% on GPQA Diamond. Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite offers 2.5x faster responses at low cost, pushing efficiency in production AI.
findings.claim_excerpt: Google DeepMind has launched Gemini 3.1, a suite of models... flagship Gemini 3.1 Ultra has demonstrated a score of 94.3% on the GPQA Diamond benchmark.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Advances agentic AI with multimodal real-time processing, critical for deployment in high-stakes sectors.
findings.confidence_basis: Corroborated across sources with specific benchmarks.

sources_cited.excerpt: Gemini 3.1 Ultra has demonstrated a score of 94.3% on the GPQA Diamond benchmark.
Google DeepMind’s Gemini 3.1 adds real-time voice and image analysis.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Consistent reporting on multimodal features and efficiency variants.

findings.review_reason: Verify benchmark claims and implications for agentic risks.

findings.title: Microsoft launches three MAI models with integrated safety features
findings.summary: Microsoft released MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1, and MAI-Image-2 via Foundry, priced competitively with built-in safety. This expands enterprise AI with human-centric safeguards.
findings.claim_excerpt: Microsoft is announcing 3 new world class MAI models... with integrated safety features for secure deployment.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Demonstrates regulatory-aligned deployment with safety-by-design, influencing enterprise standards.
findings.confidence_basis: Detailed in two sources with pricing and features.

Microsoft releases three multimodal AI models... with pricing positioned as more cost-effective.

findings.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.4 achieves human-level on desktop agentic benchmarks
findings.summary: GPT-5.4 with 1M token context scores 75% on OSWorld-V, surpassing human baseline in multi-step workflows. Marks shift to autonomous AI agents.
findings.claim_excerpt: GPT-5.4 is the first general-purpose model OpenAI has released with native, state-of-the-art computer-use capabilities.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Pushes agentic AI risks, enabling complex autonomous operations without human oversight.

sources_cited.excerpt: GPT-5.4... enabling agents to operate computers and carry out complex workflows.
OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4... scored 75%, slightly above the human baseline of 72.4%.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Specific benchmark score and context window confirmed across sources.

findings.review_reason: Probe for associated safety incidents or jailbreaks.

findings.title: Google's TurboQuant slashes AI memory needs by 6x
findings.summary: TurboQuant algorithm reduces KV cache memory by sixfold without accuracy loss, enabling efficient long-context models. Lowers barriers for widespread deployment.
findings.claim_excerpt: TurboQuant allows models with massive context windows to run far more efficiently.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Accelerates AI infrastructure scaling and on-device adoption, impacting capex trends.
findings.confidence_basis: Dated April 2 with technical details in two sources.

sources_cited.excerpt: Date: April 2, 2026... reduces the memory overhead caused by the KV cache.
Google TurboQuant reduces AI memory needs by sixfold without accuracy loss.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Technical method and impact consistently described.

findings.review_reason: Quantify cost savings for I5 investment tracking.

findings.title: Anthropic doubles compute capacity with Opus 4.5 breakthrough
findings.summary: Anthropic's compute doubling enabled Opus 4.5, closing gap with OpenAI. OpenAI plans pull ahead in H2 2026, escalating US AI compute race.
findings.claim_excerpt: Anthropic more than doubled its capacity... got Anthropic close to OpenAI’s total capacity.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Heightens US-China proxy race via domestic lab competition and export control pressures.
